children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: For the purpose described in subsection (b), the Secretary, acting through the Center for Substance Abuse Treatment, shall make an allotment each fiscal year for each State in an amount determined in accordance with . The Secretary shall make a grant to the State of the allotment made for the State for the fiscal year if the State submits to the Secretary an application in accordance with .section 300x–33 of this titlesection 300x–32 of this title

children.heading: Authorized activities
children.label: b Authorized activities
children.text: A funding agreement for a grant under subsection (a) is that, subject to , the State involved will expend the grant only for the purpose of carrying out the plan developed in accordance with and for planning, carrying out, and evaluating activities to prevent, treat, and provide recovery support services for substance use disorders and for related activities authorized in .section 300x–31 of this titlesection 300x–32(b) of this titlesection 300x–24 of this title
